description: EOSIO is blockchain software for running EOSIO-based networks and interacting with them via node software and command-line tools. The eos.io domain itself did not yield accessible public developer docs or API endpoints during discovery.
summary: eos.io does not expose discoverable public developer surfaces on its own domain; the only corroborated developer surface found is the archived EOSIO `cleos` CLI documented on GitHub, with authentication mechanics not determinable from the available docs.
